잠언 15:1.content: A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.

잠언 15:2.content: The tongue of the wise commends knowledge, but the mouth of fools gush out folly.

잠언 15:3.content: Yahweh’s eyes are everywhere, keeping watch on the evil and the good.

잠언 15:4.content: A gentle tongue is a tree of life, but deceit in it crushes the spirit.

잠언 15:5.content: A fool despises his father’s correction, but he who heeds reproof shows prudence.

잠언 15:6.content: In the house of the righteous is much treasure, but the income of the wicked brings trouble.

잠언 15:7.content: The lips of the wise spread knowledge; not so with the heart of fools.

잠언 15:8.content: The sacrifice made by the wicked is an abomination to Yahweh, but the prayer of the upright is his delight.

잠언 15:9.content: The way of the wicked is an abomination to Yahweh, but he loves him who follows after righteousness.

잠언 15:10.content: There is stern discipline for one who forsakes the way: whoever hates reproof shall die.

잠언 15:11.content: Sheol and Abaddon are before Yahweh— how much more then the hearts of the children of men!

잠언 15:12.content: A scoffer doesn’t love to be reproved; he will not go to the wise.

잠언 15:13.content: A glad heart makes a cheerful face, but an aching heart breaks the spirit.

잠언 15:14.content: The heart of one who has understanding seeks knowledge, but the mouths of fools feed on folly.

잠언 15:15.content: All the days of the afflicted are wretched, but one who has a cheerful heart enjoys a continual feast.

잠언 15:16.content: Better is little, with the fear of Yahweh, than great treasure with trouble.

잠언 15:17.content: Better is a dinner of herbs, where love is, than a fattened calf with hatred.

잠언 15:18.content: A wrathful man stirs up contention, but one who is slow to anger appeases strife.

잠언 15:19.content: The way of the sluggard is like a thorn patch, but the path of the upright is a highway.

잠언 15:20.content: A wise son makes a father glad, but a foolish man despises his mother.

잠언 15:21.content: Folly is joy to one who is void of wisdom, but a man of understanding keeps his way straight.

잠언 15:22.content: Where there is no counsel, plans fail; but in a multitude of counselors they are established.

잠언 15:23.content: Joy comes to a man with the reply of his mouth. How good is a word at the right time!

잠언 15:24.content: The path of life leads upward for the wise, to keep him from going downward to Sheol.

잠언 15:25.content: Yahweh will uproot the house of the proud, but he will keep the widow’s borders intact.

잠언 15:26.content: Yahweh detests the thoughts of the wicked, but the thoughts of the pure are pleasing.

잠언 15:27.content: He who is greedy for gain troubles his own house, but he who hates bribes will live.

잠언 15:28.content: The heart of the righteous weighs answers, but the mouth of the wicked gushes out evil.

잠언 15:29.content: Yahweh is far from the wicked, but he hears the prayer of the righteous.

잠언 15:30.content: The light of the eyes rejoices the heart. Good news gives health to the bones.

잠언 15:31.content: The ear that listens to reproof lives, and will be at home among the wise.

잠언 15:32.content: He who refuses correction despises his own soul, but he who listens to reproof gets understanding.

잠언 15:33.content: The fear of Yahweh teaches wisdom. Before honor is humility.
